body.title: CLOSED: scan_ebooks + calibre_catalog use paths() for all paths
body.result: scan_ebooks OUTPUT now uses paths().source_root; pass condition confirmed
body.description:
Pass-2 area_6 finding: scan_ebooks.py and calibre_catalog.py hardcode /home/akien/.TheIgors/akien/onedrive/... paths. Replace with paths().ebooks_root and paths().calibre_library from the paths abstraction.

**Affected files:** lab/tools/scan_ebooks.py, lab/claudecode/calibre_catalog.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — replace hardcoded path strings with paths() calls. OUT — changing any scan/catalog logic.
**Test plan:** Import both files; assert paths are derived from paths() not literal strings; existing tests pass.
**Pass condition:** `grep -n '/home/akien' lab/tools/scan_ebooks.py lab/claudecode/calibre_catalog.py` returns empty.
